title: Amy Kligman: The Salon for Possible Futures
description: Amy Kligman: The Salon for Possible Futures is a built environment installation that takes on the familiar shape of a living room. title: Julie Buffalohead: Stories of Becoming
description: The stories adapted from European folktales often feature a desire for riches, status, and romance. In comparison, Indigenous stories highlight relations to other beings. title: Everyday Democracy: Life, Liberty, and the Pursuit of Happiness in Johnson County
